footer.bottom_note: Legal documents and privacy contact remain permanently available.

landing.hero_subtitle: Research & community for people living with Ankylosing Spondylitis
landing.hero_description: An open platform that makes current science accessible — and creates a place where people with AS are not alone.
landing.origin_quote: I built this for my best friend. So that he, and everyone else living with Ankylosing Spondylitis, knows: someone is thinking of you.
landing.mission_text: Medical research is often hard to access — for patients, and sometimes even for doctors. SpondylAtlas reads the studies, evaluates them, and explains what they mean for your everyday life.
landing.feature_research_desc: Current studies, automatically graded and translated into plain language. No jargon without explanation.
landing.feature_forum_desc: A forum for people with AS and their loved ones — to share, to support, to understand.
landing.feature_open_desc: Open source, transparent, no ads. Because some things matter more than business models.
landing.cta_bottom_text: Register for free — and join a community that is there for each other.
landing.how_intro: Behind the platform, AI agents work around the clock — built with OpenClaw and Claude by Anthropic.
landing.how_step1_text: Agents search PubMed and Europe PMC daily for new AS studies and store them directly in the database.
landing.how_step2_text: Every study is automatically classified using the Oxford standard — from case reports to systematic reviews.
landing.how_step3_text: Claude summarises each study clearly: what was studied, what was found, and what it means for patients.
landing.how_step4_text: Over time, the agents will look beyond individual papers — surfacing connections that no one has explicitly described before.
